decision.archive_summary: Previous topic is resolved: fixed regression coverage was expanded to include harder natural-Chinese multi-turn topic-shift cases, with an explicit preference against whitelist/hardcoded handling. The implemented behavior changes summarized in the thread were: under `continue`, if any turn would be demoted to pin-only, activation is rejected; and `summary-first` is no longer forced when keeping raw turns is lighter. The user now wants to stop this implementation thread and start a fresh round of testing focused on subjective feel/improvement.
